title: RNA Purification with Magnetic Beads
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol automates the purification of RNA using magnetic beads. It can support up to 94 samples and can have a custom starting well position. The protocol is also optimized for tip conservation and reuses tips for various steps. Explanation of parameters below: - `Number of Samples`: The total number of samples per run. The maximum samples supported is 94 samples. This value is also used to determine additional wells needed when setting a `Starting Well` below. For example, if there are 3 samples and the starting well is C7, then the sample wells for all plates will be C7, D7, E7. - `Starting Well Name`: The well name samples should begin with for each 96 well plate in the protocol. - `P300 Single GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify which mount (left or right) to load the P300 single channel pipette. - `Thermocycler Hold Temperature (°C)`: The temperature the thermocycler will be set to and held for the entire protocol. - `Magnetic Module Engage Height (mm)`: The height the magnets should raise. - `Supernatant Removal Radius (X-dimension) (mm)`: The radius in the X-dimension of how far the pipette should move before aspirating supernatant. **Note: Only enter positive values. The protocol will automatically determine the side (+/-) based on the well/column.** - `Supernatant Removal Aspirate Flow Rate (uL/s)`: The aspiration flow rate at which the pipette will aspirate supernatant. - `Supernatant Removal Dispense Flow Rate (uL/s)`: The aspiration flow rate at which the pipette will dispense supernatant. ---
steps_raw: This protocol automates the purification of RNA using magnetic beads. It can support up to 94 samples and can have a custom starting well position. The protocol is also optimized for tip conservation and reuses tips for various steps. Explanation of parameters below: - `Number of Samples`: The total number of samples per run. The maximum samples supported is 94 samples. This value is also used to determine additional wells needed when setting a `Starting Well` below. For example, if there are 3 samples and the starting well is C7, then the sample wells for all plates will be C7, D7, E7. - `Starting Well Name`: The well name samples should begin with for each 96 well plate in the protocol. - `P300 Single GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify which mount (left or right) to load the P300 single channel pipette. - `Thermocycler Hold Temperature (°C)`: The temperature the thermocycler will be set to and held for the entire protocol. - `Magnetic Module Engage Height (mm)`: The height the magnets should raise. - `Supernatant Removal Radius (X-dimension) (mm)`: The radius in the X-dimension of how far the pipette should move before aspirating supernatant. **Note: Only enter positive values. The protocol will automatically determine the side (+/-) based on the well/column.** - `Supernatant Removal Aspirate Flow Rate (uL/s)`: The aspiration flow rate at which the pipette will aspirate supernatant. - `Supernatant Removal Dispense Flow Rate (uL/s)`: The aspiration flow rate at which the pipette will dispense supernatant. ---
Set Thermocycler to 4°C
Dilute Magnetic Beads
Transfer 30uL of Magnetic Beads to Purification Plate
Engage Magnet to Recover beads
Delay for 2 minutes for attracting beads
Remove supernatant from the side of the well
Open Thermocycler Lid and Dilute Samples/Mix Samples using RNAse-free water (RFW)
Disengage Magnetic Module
Transfer Mixed Samples to Magnetic Beads and Mix
Add RNA Binding Buffer (RBB) to samples
Mix Beads with RBB and samples
Pause: Shake Beads on External Shaker
Engage Magnet to Recover beads
Delay for 2 minutes for attracting beads
Remove supernatant from the side of the well
Disengage Magnetic Module
Add Wash Buffer (WB) to Samples
Mix Beads with WB and samples
Engage Magnetic Module
Delay for 2 minutes for extracting beads
Remove WB
Delay for 20 minutes to allow beads to dry
Disengage Magnetic Module
Perform First Elution with RNAse-free water
Delay for 5 minutes to Elute RNA from the Magnet
Engage Magnetic Module
Delay for 2 minutes
Set Temperature Module to 4°C
Transfer first elution into the cooled recipient plate on the temperature module
Disengage Magnetic Module
Add fresh RNAse-free water for second eluate
Mix Beads with Second Elution Buffer
Pause for 5 minutes for eluting RNA from beads
Engage Magnetic Module
Delay for 2 minutes for extracting beads
Transfer second elution into the cooled recipient plate on the temperature module
Deactivate all modules
Protocol Completed!
